## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and RAMP to discuss performance metrics, vendor pages updates, and AEO tracking strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance held steady overall; slight volatility due to Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [RAMP is updating vendor page design with new data resources from G2](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [AEO tracking improvements discussed; potential shift to using Profound for consolidated reporting](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Cashflow desk proposal and next steps pending; Mara to follow up with more info](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Topics

### Performance Overview

  - [Blog performance stable week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Per DM pages: slight decline; Washington up, TX/OR/CA/FL down](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Expense category pages: steady, minor position losses](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Tuning pages: stable; only quarterly taxes underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Treasury pages: liquidity position report driving performance, sessions down](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Vendor pages: steady performance, AI content leading](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Vendor Page Updates

  - [New batch of vendor pages in progress (classified and categorized)](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Design updates incoming:](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [Categories now based on G2 data](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [New layout with top summary and expanded dropdown options](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Key features section likely moving to dropdown](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [Aiming for SEO improvements with new design](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### AEO Tracking and Reporting

  - [Current GrowthX methods:](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [LLM referrals from GA4 in dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Scrunch tool for brand visibility in prompts](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [RAMP using Profound:](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Separate instance for third-party URLs (incl. YouTube)](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Tracking citations and watched URLs](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Discussion on consolidating efforts:](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [Potential for GrowthX to access and manage Profound reporting](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Goal: clearer AEO reporting as high priority for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/7YZ546pJvSdeBZ54KBX8JyNxDyqfLrrg?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
